title: Sweet Medleys Fish Medley
description: A sweet and creamy mediterranean dish featuring fish seasoned with herbs and spices, served as a light dinner.

ingredients.name: 1 can diced tomatoes
ingredients.notes: canned crushed tomatoes work well too

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup creamy coconut milk
ingredients.notes: full-fat for best flavor and texture

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp tomato paste
ingredients.notes: adjust to taste, can be omitted if preferred

ingredients.name: 1 tsp ground cumin
ingredients.notes: optional, adds a nice earthy note

ingredients.name: 1/4 tsp smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: optional, for added depth of flavor

ingredients.name: 1 tbsp chopped fresh dill
ingredients.notes: fresh is best but finely dried can be used if necessary

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse tilapia fillets under cold water.
In a medium saucepan, combine tomatoes, coconut milk, tomato paste, cumin, smoked paprika, if using. Stir well and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Add salt and pepper to taste and mix well until the liquid begins to thicken slightly (about 10 minutes).
Carefully add tilapia fillets into the saucepan, ensuring they are fully coated with the marinade on all sides. Place in an oven-safe dish or directly onto a baking sheet.
Bake for about 15-20 minutes or until the fish is opaque and flakes easily with a fork.
Garnish with fresh dill before serving.
